content.en:
The Alomu Ancient Demon said solemnly: "The space-time bubble is impossible to destroy under normal circumstances, but if it enters the final period of the endless space-time line, the endless space-time line will fall into immersion, and the space-time bubble will become very fragile, and the ultimate ancient demon can destroy it." And in the last period of the endless space-time line, the space-time bubble was destroyed, and even a batch of ultimate ancient demons fell.

However, that era is too old, so far away that many main departments have not been established, and now there are only six main departments that have survived from that era, and our main department of Aromu is one of them.

At that time, our Arrow Mother Main Department was not the main department, it was a top tribe under the command of a main department, and all the ultimate ancient demons of that main department fell, which made our Arrow Mother Main Department rise!"

"That's what happened!"

The Ancient Demon of Stygian was shocked.

It turns out that the space-time bubble can also be destroyed, and the ultimate ancient demon will also fall.

"But why would those Ultimate Ancient Demons kill each other once they reach the End of the Ages?" asked the Stygian Ancient Demon curiously, with a new question.

Aromu Ancient Demon Dao: "Because of the benefits, in the final period, it is possible to give birth to treasures that are enough to make the ultimate ancient demon crazy in the endless space-time line or even in a certain space-time bubble, and there is a glimmer of hope that it can surpass the ultimate space-time and become the only space-time level ultimate ancient demon!"

"Although the chance of becoming a space-time level ultimate ancient demon is very small, many ultimate ancient demons have been working hard for this goal, and even if they can't become a space-time level ultimate ancient demon, if they snatch that kind of treasure, their strength will be terrifyingly improved. For example, in the last final period, the final big winner, the ultimate ancient demon - Dovi Ancient Demon, her strength has reached an extremely terrifying level, even if ten ultimate ancient demons join forces together, it is ~ not her opponent. "

The Ancient Demon Path of Aroye.

"Dovi Ancient!"

The information of this ultimate ancient demon appeared in the mind of the Stygian Ancient Demon, and the other party was the ultimate ancient demon of the main department of the Heavenly Tower, and there were not many ultimate ancient demons in the main department of the Heavenly Tower, and there were only five of them.

The deterrent power of the Keduowei Ancient Demon is indeed terrifying, and no one targets the main department of the Heavenly Tower, which is known as the first main department.

Before, she didn't understand why there were not many Ultimate Ancient Demons in the main part of the Heavenly Tower, why it was known as the first main department, but now she finally knew.

Everything is just because of the Dovi Ancient Demon, the other party's strength is too strong, and there is no doubt that it is the strongest Ultimate Ancient Demon that surpasses the other Ultimate Ancient Demons.

Who would dare to provoke the Dorvi Demons?

This is the only terrifying existence that has the strength and confidence to kill other ultimate ancient demons alone!

That is to say, Duowei Ancient Demon was afraid of many Ultimate Ancient Demons joining forces, and also wanted to impact the time-space level Ultimate Ancient Demon, and had been practicing in retreat, which did not cause panic among other Ultimate Ancient Demons.

Otherwise, the other Ultimate Ancient Demons would have to be too scared to separate.

......

Ye Tian didn't know about the conversation of Ah Luo's mother's main department, and he was still trying to comprehend.

Gradually, a relatively long period of time passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's laughter echoed in the dojo.

He was so excited, he finally fused that wisp of the ultimate rule of the Sword Extreme Dao with his own Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule, so that his own Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule contained the edge of the ultimate rule of the Extreme Dao of the Sword.

Now, his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule is naturally not the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao Ultimate Rule, but it is at least equivalent to half of the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Path Ultimate Rule.

With this realization, the power of many of his ultimate arcanes and even the power of the extreme ultimate arcane soared, and his overall strength was sublimated like a transformation!

And in these long years, with the help of many resources, his cultivation has also been greatly improved.

Now, his cultivation has reached the late stage of the top Ancient Demon level, and he is infinitely close to the peak cultivation of the top Ancient Demon level.

In addition, he comprehended the Ultimate Source Crystal Fragment of Time and Space, and had a lot of insights into the Extreme Life Pattern.

Now, he has once again perfected his life pattern, although it has not reached the level of the Extreme Dao Life Pattern, it is definitely equivalent to the level of the half-step Extreme Life Pattern.

Flesh Transformation!

The power skyrockets!

Combat Strength Soars!

It was hard for Ye Tiandu to imagine what terrifying level his combat power had reached now.

Perhaps, with his current physical strength, he can explore the endless space-time line.

In the past, he couldn't stay in the Endless Spaceline for too long, but now, with his incomparably strong physical body and the power of half of the Ultimate Rules of the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao, he had no problem resisting the power of the Endless Spaceline.

So, on this day, a replica body of Ye Tian left the abyss of Aromu and came to the endless time and space line.

It was empty, nothing, only the power of the endless space-time line, constantly shrinking time, trying to merge him into the space-time line, but he easily resisted.

"Sure enough, with my current strength, even if it is not as good as the ultimate ancient demon to roam freely in the endless time and space line, it is not too much worse, and it can last for a long time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Then, he began to explore the endless planes frantically, spanning long distances, without the slightest fear that he would be lost.

Even if you really get lost, it's a big deal to lose a replica body.

Ye Tian didn't know how long he had been shuttling, he couldn't see any space-time bubbles anymore, as if everything was an endless space-time line, which was really a bit boring.

Before you know it, countless ancient demon eras have passed.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian saw something new in the shuttle of endless time and space.

"It's a drop of blood!"

Ye Tian shuttled over and saw this drop of blood, which was very large, about hundreds of thousands of meters, in the eyes of ordinary people, this was a sea of blood, but in Ye Tian's opinion, it was a drop of natural blood.

"It should be the blood of some powerful creature, otherwise it wouldn't be so huge!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Immediately, he began to study this drop of blood, and soon sensed the power of space-time particles from the blood, and it was also very advanced, and even the power of the ultimate rule of the Extreme Dao.

"It's the ultimate rule of the Time Pole and the ultimate rule of the Spatial Pole with a broken wisp!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

In this way, the value of this drop of blood is extremely precious, and it is not known what kind of creature left it.

So, he stayed here to study this drop of blood, maybe he could gain a lot of insights, and even improve his own strength.
